Table DIM_GCTS_QUESTION

Card of table DIM_GCTS_QUESTION

Name

DIM_GCTS_QUESTION

Code

DIM_GCTS_QUESTION

DBMS

ANSI Level 2


Description of the table DIM_GCTS_QUESTION

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Dim will base on:
select * from
DB_CONS_STG_DEV.STG_GCTS.V_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP QM
join DB_CONS_STG_DEV.STG_GCTS.V_GCTS_COUNTRY_CATEGORY CC on cc.COUNTRYCATEGORYID=qm.COUNTRYCATEGORYID
where
cc._ETL_ACTIVE_FLAG=true and qm._ETL_ACTIVE_FLAG=true

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Unique row will be defined by:
variableid+COUNTRYCATEGORYID on source side
variableid_bk+COUNTRYCATEGORYID_BK on target side

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Columns mapping:
DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY <- MD5(variableid||COUNTRYCATEGORYID )
variableid_bk <- variableid
COUNTRYCATEGORYID_BK <- COUNTRYCATEGORYID
Other: 1:1

SCD1, unique business key: variableid+COUNTRYCATEGORYID


Check constraint name of the table DIM_GCTS_QUESTION

CKT_DIM_GCTS_QUESTION


Server validation rule of the table DIM_GCTS_QUESTION

%RULES%


Code preview of the table DIM_GCTS_QUESTION

drop index DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_PK;

drop table DIM_GCTS_QUESTION cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: DIM_GCTS_QUESTION
--==============================================================
create table DIM_GCTS_QUESTION (
DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY CHAR(254) not null,
VARIABLEID_BK CHAR(254),
COUNTRYCATEGORYID_BK CHAR(254),
QUESTIONCODE CHAR(254),
TOPLEVELFIELD CHAR(254),
FIRSTLEVELITERATOR CHAR(254),
FIRSTLEVELFLD CHAR(254),
FIRSTLEVELLABEL CHAR(254),
SECONDLEVELITERATOR CHAR(254),
SECONDLEVELFLD CHAR(254),
SECONDLEVELLABEL CHAR(254),
DATAPATTERN CHAR(254),
COUNTRYDISPLAYNAME CHAR(254),
CATEGORY CHAR(254),
COUNTRY CHAR(254),
CATEGORYDISPLAYNAME CHAR(254),
STATUS CHAR(254),
_ETL_LOAD_DATETIME DATE,
_ETL_RUN_ID NUMERIC,
_ETL_JOB_ID NUMERIC,
primary key (DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY)
);

--==============================================================
-- Index: DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_PK
--==============================================================
create unique index DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_PK on DIM_GCTS_QUESTION (
DIM_GCTS_QUESTION_MAP_KEY ASC
);
